name: volcengine-waf
description: OctoBus package for Volcengine Web Application Firewall read-only query APIs.

Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/ListDomain.name: list-domain
Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/ListDomain.description: Query Volcengine WAF protected domain settings.

Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/QueryProte.name: query-protection-overview-lb
Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/QueryProte.description: Query Volcengine WAF protection overview metrics.

Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/QueryAttac.name: query-attack-security-event
Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/QueryAttac.description: Query Volcengine WAF attack security events.

Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/ListAclRul.name: list-acl-rule
Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/ListAclRul.description: Query Volcengine WAF access control rules.

Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/ListCCRule.name: list-cc-rule
Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/ListCCRule.description: Query Volcengine WAF CC protection rules.

Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/SearchLogs.name: search-logs
Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/SearchLogs.description: Search Volcengine WAF access and attack logs.

Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/InvokeRead.name: invoke-read-only-action
Volcengine_WAF.Volcengine_WAF/InvokeRead.description: Invoke an allowed Volcengine WAF read-only action.
